title: [MEDIUM] Billing issue — BlueOrbit Media
text:
Customer: BlueOrbit Media (Mid-Market)
Product area: Billing
Priority: medium
Status: resolved

Description: The billing page double-charged us this month and support took 9 days to reply.

Support notes: Reproduced on our side. Added to backlog.

text:

Product area: Dashboards

Support notes: Reproduced on our side. Added to backlog.

text:
